headline: Markets Run on Math. Now Your Edge Does Too.
subheadline: HeadyFinance applies Continuous Semantic Logic and φ-scaled risk mathematics to financial markets — generating institutional-grade signals, geometric risk models, and backtesting frameworks that quantitative analysts spend months building from scratch.
body: Every signal passes through a multi-gate CSL validation pipeline before publication. φ-scaled position sizing derived from Fibonacci retracement levels. Monte Carlo simulations with 10,000+ scenario paths. Multi-asset coverage across equities, crypto, forex, and options — all accessible via a REST/WebSocket API designed for systematic traders.
disclaimer: Informational only. Not financial advice. Trading involves substantial risk of loss.

badge.text: Research access available — no credit card required
